name: eval/data/mass_adk_artifacts.test.json
description: Artifact and checkpoint inspection evals for original MASS runtime integration.

parts.text: Inspect local MASS result artifacts and explain how they connect the ADK app to the original MASS runtime.

The response should explain that MASS-ADK reads artifacts produced by the original MASS runtime, mention results/checkpoints, and avoid claiming parquet or pickle content parsing beyond tool-returned metadata.
Inspect the checkpoint ih_2_2_False_False_5_False_20230615_20230620_False_sa_Signal_std_False_0.0_seed01_std and summarize whether the smoke run completed.
The response should inspect the named checkpoint, mention completed dates or date_committed progress if available, and state that the inspection is read-only.
